name: Mexican Chocolate Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the unsweetened chocolate in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add butter and stir constantly until melted.
3. Gradually add light corn syrup, sugar, and optional salt, stirring continuously.
4. Stir in cream.
5. Cook over low heat for 10 minutes, stirring constantly.
6. Serve over pound cake or ice cream.
7. Store the sauce in a jar covered with the lid in the refrigerator. It will keep up to 3 months.
8. To warm the sauce, place the jar in a pan of hot water set over low heat.
